title: What's new in Looker: Empowering business users in the governed agentic era
summary: Google Cloud presented advancements to Looker, a business intelligence platform, integrating agentic AI features through Gemini. New capabilities include dashboard agents for workflow automation, conversational analytics, and a semantic layer for grounding AI in trusted data governance.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech presents new Looker capabilities that bring agentic AI to the business intelligence platform through Gemini. The video covers dashboard agents for workflow automation, conversational analytics, and a semantic layer that grounds AI outputs in governed, trusted data. These additions matter because they extend self-service analytics to business users while keeping data governance intact. The key takeaway: Looker pairs agentic and conversational features with a semantic layer so AI responses stay anchored to defined, reliable data.
